title: Craft Hub
description: Modpack for Comrad's Hub server. Join us on our Discord server!
body:
## Modpack for Comrad's Hub server.

If you want to play on our server join our [Discord channel](https://discord.gg/RuF9qjyWyV)!

Modpack was based on Better Adventures+ modpack from YouTuber [Flowstate](https://www.youtube.com/@flowstatevideo). However, after version 3.0 pack was fully re-made based on [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) modpack.

If I've used your mod/resourcepack/datapacks and must credit you - please ask @DmytroComrad on the discord server.

Modpack was not made for widespread use and there probably won't be too much updates in the future, but your download is still appreciated.
